hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】实时市场：随着美国 PCE 通胀符合预期，比特币保持在 61,000 美元上方；【AI】新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境；【FINANCE】摩根大通宣布500亿美元回购 高盛在美联储压力测试后提高股息。

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin holds above $61,000 as U.S. PCE inflation comes in as expected
items.summary: A liquidation flush took bitcoin to its lowest since early June before Micron's blowout earnings and SK Hynix's U.S. listing plans steadied the AI trade that crypto had been sliding alongside.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：随着美国 PCE 通胀符合预期，比特币保持在 61,000 美元上方
items.summary_zh: 在美光科技的井喷盈利和 SK 海力士的美国上市计划稳定了加密货币一直下滑的人工智能交易之前，清算潮将比特币推至 6 月初以来的最低水平。

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将高效算法与专用硬件相结合，使用最少的内存和功耗快速生成用于导航的 3D 地图。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase unveils $50 billion buyback, Goldman Sachs raises dividend after Fed stress test
items.summary: The announcements followed the release of the Federal Reserve's annual stress test, which found that all 32 large banks weathered a hypothetical recession.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通宣布500亿美元回购 高盛在美联储压力测试后提高股息
items.summary_zh: 这些公告是在美联储发布年度压力测试之后发布的，该测试发现所有 32 家大型银行都经受住了假设的衰退。

items.title: Federal Reserve says U.S. banks can withstand $708 billion in losses amid overhaul of capital rules
items.summary: The Fed's annual exercise comes at a pivotal moment for bank regulation because, unlike previous years, the results will not affect capital requirements.
items.title_zh: 美联储称美国银行可承受资本规则改革期间7080亿美元的损失
items.summary_zh: 美联储的年度演习正值银行监管的关键时刻，因为与往年不同，此次演习的结果不会影响资本要求。

items.title: Micron delivers blowout earnings, surges 16% and deals crypto bulls a blow
items.summary: Micron Technology surged after blockbuster earnings and strong guidance, lifting AI memory stocks.
items.title_zh: 美光科技实现井喷式盈利，股价飙升 16%，给加密货币多头带来沉重打击
items.summary_zh: 美光科技 (Micron Technology) 在公布巨额盈利和强劲指引后股价飙升，提振了人工智能内存股。

items.title: Live Updates: As Europe Bakes, Spain Warns of a Possible High Death Toll
items.summary: A Spanish monitoring agency linked the extreme heat to an estimated rise in deaths since Sunday. Days of scorching temperatures are testing Europe’s ability to adapt to extreme weather.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：欧洲陷入困境，西班牙警告死亡人数可能很高
items.summary_zh: 西班牙监测机构将周日以来的极端高温与估计死亡人数上升联系起来。连日的高温正在考验欧洲适应极端天气的能力。

items.title: ‘Waiting for buyers’: Bitcoin holds fragile $60K floor ahead of $10.6B quarterly expiry
items.summary: Bitcoin fell to the low $60,000s ahead of a $10.6B June 26 quarterly expiry as $469M in ETF outflows and negative gamma weigh on sentiment.
items.title_zh: “等待买家”：比特币在 10.6B 季度到期之前保持脆弱的 6 万美元底线
items.summary_zh: 在 6 月 26 日 10.6B 季度到期之前，比特币跌至 60,000 美元低点，因为 4.69 亿美元的 ETF 流出和负伽马影响了市场情绪。

items.title: Ripple launches RLUSD stablecoin in Japan after regulatory approval
items.summary: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin is available through SBI VC Trade for both institutional and retail users in the country.
items.title_zh: Ripple 获得监管机构批准后在日本推出 RLUSD 稳定币
items.summary_zh: Ripple 的 RLUSD 稳定币可通过 SBI VC Trade 供该国的机构和零售用户使用。

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
items.title_zh: GPT-5 如何帮助免疫学家 Derya Unutmaz 解开 3 年前的谜团
items.summary_zh: GPT-5 Pro 帮助解决了一个长达 3 年的免疫学谜团，提供了对 T 细胞行为的见解。这一突破可以支持癌症和自身免疫研究。

items.title: MIT’s Initiative for New Manufacturing builds momentum
items.summary: In its first year, INM has worked across research, workforce development, and industry engagement to help accelerate new manufacturing technologies and their real-world deployment.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新制造倡议蓄势待发
items.summary_zh: 在成立的第一年，INM 致力于研究、劳动力发展和行业参与，以帮助加速新制造技术及其实际部署。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: Trump asks Congress for billions for Iran war, after tension with Republicans
items.summary: But the budget faces an uphill battle as the president spars with some members of his own party over the issue.
items.title_zh: 在与共和党关系紧张后，特朗普要求国会为伊朗战争提供数十亿美元
items.summary_zh: 但由于总统与本党的一些成员就这个问题发生争执，预算面临着一场艰苦的战斗。

items.title: Oil price falls back to pre-Iran war levels
items.summary: Signs that traffic through the key Strait of Hormuz shipping route is gradually resuming has helped to push the oil price down.
items.title_zh: 油价回落至伊朗战争前水平
items.summary_zh: 有迹象表明，霍尔木兹海峡主要航线的交通正在逐步恢复，这有助于推低油价。

items.title: IBM hails new 'block of flats' design breakthrough for ultra tiny chips
items.summary: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
items.title_zh: IBM 欢呼超微型芯片的新“公寓”设计突破
items.summary_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。

items.title: Philippines bans video game played by alleged high school shooter
items.summary: The rare school shooting that left three students killed and 20 others injured has shocked the country.
items.title_zh: 菲律宾禁止涉嫌高中射手玩的电子游戏
items.summary_zh: 罕见的校园枪击事件导致3名学生死亡、20人受伤，震惊全国。

items.title: North Korea Deploys Its First Destroyer, Vowing to Project Nuclear Power by Sea
items.summary: The 5,000-ton Choe Hyon is the largest warship North Korea has ever built and is said to be armed with nuclear-capable missiles.
items.title_zh: 朝鲜部署第一艘驱逐舰，誓言通过海上投射核能
items.summary_zh: 5000吨级的崔贤号是朝鲜有史以来建造的最大军舰，据说配备了核导弹。

items.title: Uniswap, Spark aim to build stablecoin FX market as banks, fintechs enter the industry
items.summary: The protocols are building shared liquidity and trading infrastructure for a future with hundreds of competing digital currencies on blockchain rails.
items.title_zh: 随着银行、金融科技公司进入该行业，Uniswap 和 Spark 旨在建立稳定币外汇市场
items.summary_zh: 这些协议正在为未来在区块链轨道上建立数百种竞争性数字货币的共享流动性和交易基础设施提供支持。

items.title: SBI Holdings agrees to acquire Japanese crypto exchange Bitbank in $288.6 million deal
items.summary: SBI Holdings agreed to acquire Bitbank for $288.6 million, with the transaction expected to close around October 2026.
items.title_zh: SBI Holdings 同意以 2.886 亿美元收购日本加密货币交易所 Bitbank
items.summary_zh: SBI Holdings 同意以 2.886 亿美元收购 Bitbank，交易预计将于 2026 年 10 月左右完成。

items.title: Kraken expands OTC lending through an onchain warehouse facility with Maple
items.summary: Maple’s lenders will provide a revolving line of funding to supply USDC liquidity for Kraken's over-the-counter borrowers.

items.summary_zh: Maple 的贷方将提供循环融资额度，为 Kraken 的场外借款人提供 USDC 流动性。

items.summary: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.
items.title_zh: Omio 如何打造对话式旅行的未来
items.summary_zh: 了解 Omio 如何使用 OpenAI 来增强对话式旅行体验、加速产品开发并转型为一家 AI 原生公司。

items.title: A better way to model the behavior of metal alloys
items.summary: MIT researchers’ approach captures subtle atomic patterns, improving predictions of material properties.
items.title_zh: 模拟金属合金行为的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院研究人员的方法捕捉微妙的原子模式，改善对材料特性的预测。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: Anthropic accuses Chinese rival Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities
items.summary: The firm alleged that Alibaba used fraudulent accounts to access data from its Claude AI model.
items.title_zh: Anthropic 指责中国竞争对手阿里巴巴非法提取人工智能能力
items.summary_zh: 该公司声称阿里巴巴使用欺诈账户来访问其 Claude AI 模型的数据。

items.title: Venezuela Live Updates: Death Toll Rises as Rescuers Mount Frantic Search for Quake Survivors
items.summary: The 7.2- and 7.5-magnitude earthquakes left at least 164 dead and hundreds missing, the authorities said. The full scale of the damage was still becoming clear.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉实时更新：救援人员疯狂搜寻地震幸存者，死亡人数上升
items.summary_zh: 当局表示，7.2 级和 7.5 级地震造成至少 164 人死亡、数百人失踪。损害的总体规模仍不清楚。

items.summary_zh: 2026 年 6 月 25 日天气预报

items.title: Bitcoin supply in loss reaches record high 10.83 million BTC
items.summary: Almost 11 million bitcoin are now held at a loss, while long-term holders control a record 14.8 million coins.
items.title_zh: 比特币供应量损失创历史新高1083万比特币
items.summary_zh: 目前持有近 1100 万枚比特币处于亏损状态，而长期持有者则控制着创纪录的 1480 万枚比特币。

items.title: Forget max pain theory. Bitcoin is well below the $72,000 magnet going into $10 billion options expiry
items.summary: The popular max pain theory isn’t working out as bitcoin trades far from the $72K level a day ahead of a $10 billion quarterly options settlement.
items.title_zh: 忘记最大疼痛理论。 100 亿美元期权到期时，比特币远低于 72,000 美元的磁力
items.summary_zh: 流行的最大痛苦理论并不成立，因为在 100 亿美元的季度期权结算前一天，比特币的交易价格远远低于 7.2 万美元的水平。

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
items.title_zh: 客服人员如何改变工作方式
items.summary_zh: 一篇新的 OpenAI 研究论文展示了人工智能代理如何改变工作方式，实现更长、更复杂的任务，并提高跨角色的生产力。

items.title_zh: 新的使用情况分析和更新的企业支出控制

items.title_zh: 使用 NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 加速 Transformer 微调

items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.

items.title_zh: 探索人工智能的社会影响

items.title: In game theory, generalists sometimes win out over specialists
items.summary: Researchers show that for certain kinds of games, an overlooked class of algorithms performs much better than expected.

items.summary_zh: 研究人员表明，对于某些类型的游戏，一类被忽视的算法的表现比预期要好得多。

items.title: Wendy's shares soar for a second day as retail investors pile into their new meme darling
items.summary: The stock's advance appeared largely disconnected from company fundamentals and instead reflected a burst of social-media enthusiasm.
items.title_zh: 随着散户投资者涌入他们的新宠儿，温迪股价连续第二天飙升
items.summary_zh: 该股的上涨似乎很大程度上与公司基本面无关，而是反映了社交媒体热情的爆发。

items.title: Investors still seek a human touch even with AI tools at hand: HSBC
items.summary: Investors are still turning to the judgment of a professional adviser in their last investment decision, despite using AI tools, a HSBC survey found.
items.title_zh: 即使手头有人工智能工具，投资者仍然寻求人性化：汇丰银行
items.summary_zh: 汇丰银行的一项调查发现，尽管使用了人工智能工具，投资者在做出最后的投资决策时仍然会参考专业顾问的判断。

items.title: Kalshi CEO says prediction market thinking about IPO, but not for this year
items.summary: Tarek Mansour said to CNBC's "Squawk Box" it made sense for the company at the stage to think about a debut on public markets.

items.summary_zh: 塔里克·曼苏尔 (Tarek Mansour) 向 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”表示，公司现阶段考虑在公开市场上首次亮相是有意义的。

items.title: New meme stock Wendy's soars more than 25% with trading halted at one point
items.summary: While management changes can influence investor sentiment, the magnitude of the move suggests other forces may be at play.
items.title_zh: 新meme股票Wendy's飙升逾25%，一度停牌
items.summary_zh: 虽然管理层变动会影响投资者情绪，但变动幅度之大表明可能还有其他因素在起作用。

items.title: CFTC sues Kentucky over prediction markets enforcement actions; first 'red state' to face such  lawsuit
items.summary: The commission has now sued nine states in its battle to defend what it sees as its exclusive right to regulate event contracts.
items.title_zh: CFTC 就预测市场执法行动起诉肯塔基州；第一个面临此类诉讼的“红色州”
items.summary_zh: 该委员会现已起诉九个州，以捍卫其所认为的监管赛事合同的专有权利。

items.title: Mamdani-backed candidates are likely to win in NYC primaries, prediction market traders expect
items.summary: Voters are heading to the polls in New York, with four competitive races in Democratic congressional primaries in focus.

items.summary_zh: 选民们即将前往纽约投票，民主党国会初选的四场激烈角逐成为焦点。

items.title: SpaceX seeing some interest from short sellers, but many still afraid to bet against Musk
items.summary: About 40 million SpaceX shares are sold short, roughly 5% to 7% of the shares that are publicly available to trade, according to an estimate by S3 Partners.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 看到了卖空者的一些兴趣，但许多人仍然不敢做空马斯克
items.summary_zh: 据 S3 Partners 估计，约有 4000 万股 SpaceX 股票被卖空，约占公开交易股票的 5% 至 7%。

items.title: 'I thought I was going to die' - Venezuelans describe earthquake panic
items.summary: Buildings were flattened in the capital Caracas, where voices have been heard calling from the rubble.
items.title_zh: “我以为我要死了”——委内瑞拉人描述地震恐慌
items.summary_zh: 首都加拉加斯的建筑物被夷为平地，废墟中传来呼救声。

items.title: Europe's heatwave shifts east as France raises health alert to highest level
items.summary: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.
items.title_zh: 法国将健康警报提升至最高级别，欧洲热浪东移
items.summary_zh: 德国部分地区气温可能达到 40 摄氏度，而法国官员表示，年轻人中出现了因高温而死亡的情况。

items.title: Key figure in South Africa police corruption scandal pleads guilty
items.summary: Prosecutors say Vusimusi "Cat" Matlala could provide evidence against "high-ranking officials".
items.title_zh: 南非警察腐败丑闻关键人物认罪
items.summary_zh: 检察官表示，“猫”乌西穆西·马特拉拉可以提供针对“高级官员”的证据。

items.title: Ryanair says it will reluctantly not charge parents to sit next to children
items.summary: The airline had typically charged adults a fee of £8 each way to sit with their young children.
items.title_zh: 瑞安航空表示不会向坐在孩子旁边的父母收取费用
items.summary_zh: 该航空公司通常向成人收取单程 8 英镑的费用，以便与年幼的孩子坐在一起。

items.title: Police seal off key roads in Nairobi as Kenyans march to remember protest victims
items.summary: Protesters demand justice for more than 80 people killed during the 2024 demonstrations and last year's anniversary protests.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚人游行悼念抗议受害者，警方封锁了内罗毕的主要道路
items.summary_zh: 抗议者要求为 2024 年示威活动和去年周年纪念抗议活动中丧生的 80 多人伸张正义。

items.title: Can a Youth Boom Survive South Sudan’s Education Crisis?
items.summary: South Sudan is the world’s newest nation and its education system is on the verge of collapse, putting an entire generation at risk.
items.title_zh: 青年繁荣能否渡过南苏丹的教育危机？
items.summary_zh: 南苏丹是世界上最新的国家，其教育系统正处于崩溃的边缘，使整整一代人面临风险。

items.title: Iraq’s New Leader Faces Resistance Trying to Bring Militias Under State Control
items.summary: The Trump administration has demanded that Iraqi leaders distance themselves from Iran and rein in Iran-linked militias that are outside of government control.
items.title_zh: 伊拉克新领导人试图将民兵置于国家控制之下面临阻力
items.summary_zh: 特朗普政府要求伊拉克领导人与伊朗保持距离，并控制与伊朗有联系、不受政府控制的民兵组织。

items.title: King Charles III to Release Tax Details, a First for Any British Monarch
items.summary: The king is expected to release tax information on Thursday as part of a push for greater transparency after the scandal involving the former Prince Andrew.
items.title_zh: 查理三世国王将公布税收细节，这对英国君主来说尚属首次
items.summary_zh: 预计国王将于周四公布税务信息，作为在涉及前安德鲁王子的丑闻后推动提高透明度的一部分。

items.title: A Right-Wing Election Victory in Colombia, With a Little Help from Trump
items.summary: The U.S. president endorsed the right-wing winner. But his influence went further.
items.title_zh: 在特朗普的一点帮助下，右翼在哥伦比亚选举中获胜
items.summary_zh: 美国总统支持右翼获胜者。但他的影响力更进一步。

items.title: To Escape the Heat, Parisians Jump into an Old Industrial Canal
items.summary: Crowds are filling the Canal Saint-Martin in Paris, as temperatures soar above 100 degrees Fahrenheit. Forty people drowned while swimming in other waterways.
items.title_zh: 为了避暑，巴黎人跳入旧工业运河
items.summary_zh: 巴黎圣马丁运河上挤满了人群，气温飙升至 100 华氏度以上。四十人在其他水道游泳时溺水身亡。

items.title: A Puppy-Abuse Case in China, Caught on Video, Prompts Rare Public Protest
items.summary: After a man was filmed torturing dogs, hundreds gathered in a rare demonstration that the police tried to break up. For many, the sit-in was their first civic action.
items.title_zh: 中国虐待小狗案被视频捕捉到，引发罕见的公众抗议
items.summary_zh: 一名男子被拍到虐待狗后，数百人聚集在一起举行罕见的示威活动，警方试图驱散。对于许多人来说，静坐是他们的第一次公民行动。

items.title: Iran’s Loyalists Promote a Wider Nationalism, Unveiled Women Included
items.summary: Government supporters are showing off new ties with alleged former dissidents in a bid to show that they can withstand enemies at home as well as abroad.
items.title_zh: 伊朗的保皇派提倡更广泛的民族主义，其中包括不戴面纱的女性
items.summary_zh: 政府支持者正在炫耀与所谓的前持不同政见者的新关系，以表明他们能够抵御国内外的敌人。

items.title: Post-prison CZ says time behind bars didn't hurt the billionaire's business after Binance
items.summary: The pardoned ex-CEO called prison a character-building "plus" as he's pursued a venture-capital career, despite his majority stake in the world's biggest crypto exchange.
items.title_zh: 出狱后的 CZ 表示，币安出狱后，这位亿万富翁的生意并没有受到牢狱之灾的影响
items.summary_zh: 这位被赦免的前首席执行官称，尽管他拥有全球最大的加密货币交易所的多数股权，但在他追求风险投资职业时，监狱对他的性格塑造来说是一种“加分”。

items.title: Circle and Nomura join forces to target a $440 billion daily foreign exchange market in Japan
items.summary: The stablecoin giant and the Japanese financial corporation plan to deploy cross-border foreign exchange settlements as early as next year.
items.title_zh: Circle 和野村证券联手瞄准日本每日 4400 亿美元的外汇市场
items.summary_zh: 这家稳定币巨头和日本金融公司计划最早于明年部署跨境外汇结算。

items.title: CoinEx denies claims it served as $3.84 billion gateway to sanctioned Iranian crypto firms
items.summary: Blockchain analysts TRM Labs says CoinEx facilitated more than $3.8 billion in blockchain-traced flows with sanctioned Iranian crypto entities. CoinEx disputes the findings.
items.title_zh: CoinEx 否认其充当受制裁伊朗加密货币公司 38.4 亿美元门户的说法
items.summary_zh: 区块链分析师 TRM Labs 表示，CoinEx 通过受制裁的伊朗加密实体促进了超过 38 亿美元的区块链追踪资金流。 CoinEx 对调查结果提出异议。

items.title: Crypto relief rally fails to shake persistent bearish derivatives signal
items.summary: A relief rally tied to recovering U.S. equities lifted BTC and ETH off weekly lows, but bearish derivatives positioning and negative CVD suggest the rebound may be fragile.
items.title_zh: 加密货币救济反弹未能动摇持续的看跌衍生品信号
items.summary_zh: 与美国股市复苏相关的缓解性反弹使 BTC 和 ETH 脱离了周低点，但看跌衍生品头寸和负 CVD 表明反弹可能很脆弱。

items.title: Spark, Uniswap build stablecoin ‘FX Layer’ seeded with $150 million liquidity migration
items.summary: Spark is establishing a "liquidity foundation" for the new pool by migrating $150 million from its USDS ecosystem to Uniswap v4.
items.title_zh: Spark 和 Uniswap 打造稳定币“FX Layer”，并注入 1.5 亿美元的流动性迁移资金
items.summary_zh: Spark 正在通过将 1.5 亿美元从其 USDS 生态系统迁移到 Uniswap v4 来为新池建立“流动性基础”。

items.title: Half of UK wealth advisors say most clients’ crypto sits outside their oversight as 61% of European peers face firm restrictions: CoinShares
items.summary: CoinShares survey found 52% of UK advisors report most clients' crypto exposure sits outside their oversight, with firm policy a key driver.
items.title_zh: 一半的英国财富顾问表示，大多数客户的加密货币不受他们的监管，因为 61% 的欧洲同行面临严格限制：CoinShares
items.summary_zh: CoinShares 调查发现，52% 的英国顾问表示，大多数客户的加密货币风险不受他们的监督，而坚定的政策是关键驱动因素。

items.title: South Korea fines Bithumb for sharing user data overseas without consent
items.summary: South Korea ordered Bithumb to pay roughly $136,000 in penalties for violating personal information protection rules.
items.title_zh: 韩国因未经同意在海外共享用户数据而对 Bithumb 处以罚款
items.summary_zh: 韩国因违反个人信息保护规则而责令 Bithumb 支付约 136,000 美元的罚款。

items.title: CoinEx processed $3.8 billion in Iran-linked funds, acting as crypto gateway: TRM Labs
items.summary: CoinEx has also interacted with terrorist organizations, including the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, and sanctioned Russian entities.
items.title_zh: CoinEx 处理了 38 亿美元与伊朗相关的资金，充当加密网关：TRM Labs
items.summary_zh: CoinEx还与伊斯兰革命卫队等恐怖组织进行了互动，并制裁了俄罗斯实体。

items.title: Kalshi in talks to raise funds at $40 billion valuation: FT
items.summary: Kalshi's reported valuation reflects the firm's rapid growth, as it reported a $5 billion valuation last October.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 正在洽谈以 400 亿美元估值筹集资金：FT
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 公布的估值反映了该公司的快速增长，去年 10 月该公司公布的估值为 50 亿美元。

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 LLM 优化的推理芯片
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 Jalapeo，这是一款专为 LLM 推理而构建的定制 AI 芯片，旨在提高 AI 系统的性能、效率和规模。

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.
items.title_zh: 帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 Appia 基金会帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准，支持评估框架、安全实践和全球合作。

items.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.
items.title_zh: Daybreak：保护世界上每个组织的工具
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了新的 Daybreak 工具，包括 Codex Security 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​，以帮助组织大规模查找、验证和修补漏洞。

items.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.
items.title_zh: 修补地球：支持开源维护者的黎明计划
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了 Patch the Planet，这是一项 Daybreak 计划，可帮助开源维护人员通过人工智能和专家评审来查找、验证和修复漏洞。

items.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
items.summary: Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.
items.title_zh: Codex-maxxing 适用于长时间运行的工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 Jason Liu 如何使用 Codex 保存上下文、管理复杂项目以及帮助工作在单一提示之外继续进行。

items.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
items.summary: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.
items.title_zh: 三星电子为员工带来 ChatGPT 和 Codex
items.summary_zh: 三星电子向全球员工部署 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex，这标志着 OpenAI 最大的企业人工智能部署之一。

items.title: Introducing the FFASR Leaderboard: Benchmarking ASR in the Real World
items.title_zh: FFASR 排行榜简介：现实世界中的 ASR 基准测试

items.title: Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
items.title_zh: 使用 CUGA 构建真正的代理应用程序：轻量级工具上的两打工作示例

items.title: Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop
items.title_zh: 每周通过 AI、开放工具和人员参与交付 Huggingface_hub

items.title: Experimenting with the proposed Cross-Origin Storage API in Transformers.js
items.title_zh: 在 Transformers.js 中试验建议的跨域存储 API

items.title: PP-OCRv6 on Hugging Face: 50-Language OCR from 1.5M to 34.5M Parameters
items.title_zh: Hushing Face 上的 PP-OCRv6：从 1.5M 到 34.5M 参数的 50 种语言 OCR

items.title: Beyond LoRA: Can you beat the most popular fine-tuning technique?
items.title_zh: 超越LoRA：你能打败最流行的微调技术吗？

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: 我们正在通过新的投资和社区支持来加强我们在阿拉巴马州的业务。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布在 2026 年和 2027 年投资 15 亿美元，扩建其位于阿拉巴马州杰克逊县的数据中心园区。自 2019 年起在改造后的前…

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们在弗吉尼亚州的新社区投资支持当地就业并扩大能源负担能力。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: 5 ways Google Search can level up your thrift and vintage shopping
items.summary: Uncover second-hand scores with AI tools in Google Search and Shopping.
items.title_zh: Google 搜索提升您的旧货购物水平的 5 种方式
items.summary_zh: 使用 Google 搜索和购物中的 AI 工具发现二手乐谱。

items.title: How we used Gemini to build Google I/O 2026
items.summary: Learn how Googlers used AI to produce Google I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们如何使用 Gemini 构建 Google I/O 2026
items.summary_zh: 了解 Google 员工如何利用 AI 打造 Google I/O 2026。

items.title: Take our I/O 2026 quiz, vibe coded in Google AI Studio.
items.summary: We used Google AI Studio to vibe code a quiz about our top I/O 2026 announcements.
items.title_zh: 参加我们的 I/O 2026 测验，在 Google AI Studio 中进行编码。
items.summary_zh: 我们使用 Google AI Studio 编写了一个有关 I/O 2026 重要公告的测验。

items.title: 9 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action
items.summary: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: Gemini Omni 和 Gemini 3.5 的 9 个实际演示
items.summary_zh: 观看 9 个视频，展示 Google I/O 2026 上宣布的 Gemini Omni 和 Gemini 3.5 的功能。

items.title: Check out real-life AI prototypes from the Futures Lab.
items.summary: University of Waterloo students develop AI prototypes like sign language tutors to reshape the future of education and work.
items.title_zh: 查看 Futures Lab 中的真实 AI 原型。
items.summary_zh: 滑铁卢大学的学生开发了像手语导师这样的人工智能原型，以重塑教育和工作的未来。

items.title: Catch up on 12 major I/O 2026 moments
items.summary: Here are 12 of the biggest Google I/O 2026 keynote moments, including news about Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash and more.
items.title_zh: 追忆 2026 年 I/O 12 个重要时刻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 12 个最重要的 Google I/O 2026 主题演讲时刻，包括有关 Gemini Omni、Gemini 3.5 Flash 等的新闻。

items.title: Improving the speed and energy-efficiency of AI agents
items.summary: A new system, known as Murakkab, optimizes the design and deployment of multistep workflows that power AI applications.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能代理的速度和能源效率
items.summary_zh: 名为 Murakkab 的新系统优化了支持人工智能应用程序的多步骤工作流程的设计和部署。

items.title: MIT in the media: For the future of tech, "Massachusetts can absolutely lead"
items.summary: Leaders, faculty across MIT discuss fostering innovation and talent in Greater Boston in special series of articles published alongside the outlet's annual list of 'Tech Power Players'
items.title_zh: 麻省理工媒体：对于科技的未来，“马萨诸塞州绝对可以领先”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的领导者和教师在与该媒体年度“科技强者”名单一起发表的特别系列文章中讨论了如何在大波士顿地区培养创新和人才

items.title: Could AI tell you where you left your keys?
items.summary: A new spatial memory system for robots efficiently captures details about the objects they see while exploring their environment.
items.title_zh: 人工智能可以告诉你你把钥匙放在哪里了吗？
items.summary_zh: 一种新的机器人空间记忆系统可以有效地捕捉它们在探索环境时看到的物体的细节。
